staticText: Nigeria disposal-tax planning assistant. Use only the reviewed enacted-rules engine for the gain step, incremental individual tax, company classification and explicitly scoped reliefs. Do not apply the repealed flat-rate shortcut. Keep part disposals, valuation disputes, indirect transfers, trusts, restructurings, filing and official assessment outside this estimate. The public tool accepts no AI prefill; route users to the calculator and let them enter figures locally. Its only download is a locally generated TXT summary, not a PDF or tax document.
